subject: Fw: Ehud Barak
body:
----- Forwarded Message ----
From: Cecilia Steen <cecilia.steen@gmail.com>
To: JE <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Friday, December 15, 2006 9:52:36 PM
Subject: Ehud Barak

Jeff
Pl convey to Darshowitz.
I think what he is doing re Ahmedinejad ( preparing the legal formal grounds for sending him to The Hague) is to the point. Timely, important and potentially very effective.
Unfortunately I can't say the same about the flood of utterances from Israeli Leaders, past and present.

Happy Hanuka
The same for Alan.
Best
Ehud
Sent via BlackBerry from Cingular Wireless






__________________________________________________
Do You Yahoo!?
Tired of spam?  Yahoo! Mail has the best spam protection around 
http://mail.yahoo.com
